reason: Preserve the GitTab component's compact, accessible icon controls, shared SVG graph layout, and dense-panel interaction conventions.
Keep expansion and view mode as GitTab-local UI state while preserving store-mediated Git file and diff reads.
Apply required Vue UI validation, semantic styling, and icon-only accessibility checks.
Use typed local UI records and the existing shared ProjectGitFileChange model without widening bridge contracts.
Check existing tree and Git patterns before adding the one-off display transformation.
